items.scenario: You recently bought a coffee maker online, and it arrived with a cracked water tank. The store's listing promised free returns within thirty days, but the return link on your account page keeps showing an error.
items.direction: Write an email to [recipient]. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the damage you found when the package arrived
Explain the problem you had with the broken return link
Ask how you can get a replacement or a refund
items.subject: Cracked coffee maker and a return link that won't work

items.scenario: You are a tenant in a campus apartment, and the heating in your unit has stopped working for two days. The temperature outside has dropped sharply, and your earlier phone call to the front desk was never returned.
items.direction: Write an email to [recipient]. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe when the heating stopped and how cold the unit has become
Mention that your phone call was never returned
Request that a technician come as soon as possible
items.subject: No heat in apartment 4B since Tuesday

items.scenario: Your friend invited you to share a weekend cabin for a hiking trip next month. You would love to join, but you cannot leave until Saturday afternoon because of a shift at work, and you want to sort out the plan.
items.direction: Write an email to [recipient]. In your email, do the following:
goals: Thank your friend for the invitation to the cabin
Explain why you cannot arrive until Saturday afternoon
Ask whether the group can adjust the hiking schedule
items.subject: Joining the cabin trip a little late

items.scenario: You are a new intern at a design studio, and your first week ends on Friday. Your supervisor mentioned a mentorship program for interns during orientation, but you never received any details about how to sign up before the deadline.
items.direction: Write an email to [recipient]. In your email, do the following:
goals: Thank your supervisor for a helpful first week
Mention the mentorship program from orientation
Ask how you can sign up before the deadline
items.subject: Signing up for the intern mentorship program
